text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Tenno Sho is the greatest wish I
harbor as a Meijro racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Upon my pride as a member of the Mejiro family,
come what may, I shall earn its prestigious shield!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
